{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Blighted Sky
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Blighted Sky]] is a weapon created by two [[Sages]] of [[Steel Dragon’s Mountain]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
